en: Just a city boy, born and raised right here in Houston
He took the midnight train goin' anywhere
A singer in a smoky room, a smell of wine and cheap perfume
Oh, a smile they can share the night, it goes on and on and on
ko: 그들은 밤을 함께 나누기 위해 미소를 지어

en: Strangers waiting, hoping to remember their shadows searching through the night
